evidence: "This film is a pretty good Sci-fi thriller. There are lots of twists and turns."
"I simply love this show and almost everything about it."
"The film continues to follow our subjects over the decades until, well - you just have to watch it to find out."
"The characters reflect so well, and the supporting characters back at them, the personification of the value token stamped upon them."
"This show is not 'perfect' in that it probably would not work as well without the brutality contained within it."
"The film was extraordinary, almost fanatical, in its attention to the details of its script."
"The production was very well done, easing the viewer from one state of mind to the next."
"I would have given this film 5 Stars if I could...the only flaws in the production were I feel, fiscally based."

brand_loyalty.value: Terry Gilliam, Arthur C. Clarke, Rowan Atkinson
evidence: "I am a Terry Gilliam Fan. I will say that outright."
"I have a great deal of admiration and respect for Arthur C. Clarke."
"I could not help but marvel at what a visual feast the film really is, and how extremely well done it was!"
"The combination of an emotional drama and a technologically dense science fiction play are merged extremely well."
"It has some disturbing information in it, about our consensus ideas of our culture versus what might be happening behind the scenes."
"The writing was lucid and took its time to tell its tale."

additional_patterns.name: humor_preference
evidence: "Rowan Atkinson is simply brilliant in this role, which I prefer over his many others."
"A very humorous alternative to the Dickens 'A Christmas Carol'."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and thriller genres, often appreciating complex narratives and high production quality. They exhibit loyalty to notable creators like Terry Gilliam and Arthur C. Clarke, and have a high sensitivity to emotional resonance and humor in their viewing experiences.
